dashboard.energy.score.tooltip: Relative favorability level by owner fate and viewed hour; higher means better fit for meetings/negotiation, not absolute certainty.

dashboard.topic.placeholder: Example: What time should I text customer tomorrow for better response?
dashboard.forecast.title: 6 Palace Forecast
dashboard.forecast.focus.default: Viewing hour: auto-suggested from good hours today.
dashboard.forecast.focus.needBirthYear: Enter owner birth year (4 digits, 1900-2099) to enable hour guidance by fate and six palaces.
dashboard.support.contactFallback: Contact the person who issued your invite code or support team to extend usage.
dashboard.quota.exhausted: You have used all {limit} free views.
dashboard.owner.tempOther: Other person (temporary, not saved to profile)
dashboard.owner.birthYear.gateTitle: Enter owner birth year with 4 digits (1900-2099). Without a valid birth year, analysis and energy score cannot run.
dashboard.energy.birthYear.hint: Enter owner birth year (4 digits, 1900-2099) to show score and suggestion.
dashboard.energy.quote.partial.high: Today favors negotiation, calls, direct meetings, or closing terms after both sides are fully aligned.
dashboard.energy.quote.partial.mid: Today is good for starting new work, short meetings, and closing in small steps - avoid forcing too many big decisions in one session.
dashboard.energy.quote.partial.low: Use today for prep work, paperwork, and scheduling a better final-closing window - avoid forcing signatures or final commitments now.
dashboard.energy.quote.avoidClose: Delay final contract closure or major commitments; prioritize rechecking figures, verifying details, and splitting tasks to reduce misunderstanding.
dashboard.energy.quote.steadyProgress: Good for continuing discussion, aligning next steps, and clarifying conditions - no need to force a final decision yet if data is incomplete.
dashboard.energy.quote.routine: Suitable for routine and steady tasks; keep major decisions at preparation/review stage and close only when fully certain.
dashboard.result.default: Enter topic and details, then click Explore to see analysis.
